headline: Frontend Engineer & Tech Lead
bio: I'm a tech lead at a telecommunications company where I lead frontend development, focused on creating experiences that are functional, visually polished, and scalable. I'm passionate about the process of transforming problems into well-structured solutions — from code architecture to visual details.
bio2: While frontend is my core expertise, I actively engage in design and project management. I believe the best products emerge when there's coherence between technical vision, user experience, and team structure. I value documentation and clarity because they enable scalability and allow work to have lasting impact.
